title: Brake Function
parameters: jointNumber	Integer expression representing the joint number.  Values are from 1 to the number of joints on the robot.
see_also:
Returns brake status for specified joint.

Brake Statement

Brake Function Example

If Brake(1) = Off Then

		  Print "Joint 1 brake is off"

		EndIf
examples:
If Brake(1) = Off Then
		  Print "Joint 1 brake is off"
		EndIf
